records.question: What country named Austria has a population of at least 8206524, an area of at most 83871, and whose language is exactly German?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.country_id FROM country
WHERE country.name = 'Austria' AND country.population >= 8206524 AND country.area <= 83871 AND country.languages = 'German'
records.pred_sql: SELECT country.Country_ID FROM country WHERE country.Name = 'Austria' AND country.Population >= 8206524 AND country.Area <= 83871 AND country.Languages = 'German'

records.question: Which countries named Austria have an area of at least 83871 and feature operating roller coasters at the Kemah Boardwalk park?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.country_id FROM country
JOIN roller_coaster ON country.country_id = roller_coaster.country_id
WHERE country.area >= 83871 AND roller_coaster.park = 'Kemah Boardwalk' AND country.name = 'Austria' AND roller_coaster.status = 'Operating'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Country_ID
FROM country c
JOIN roller_coaster rc ON c.Country_ID = rc.Country_ID
WHERE c.Name = 'Austria'
AND c.Area >= 83871
AND rc.Park = 'Kemah Boardwalk'
AND rc.Status = 'Operating'

JOIN roller_coaster ON country.country_id = roller_coaster.country_id
WHERE roller_coaster.speed = '70'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Country_ID
FROM country c
INNER JOIN roller_coaster rc ON c.Country_ID = rc.Country_ID
WHERE rc.Speed = '70'
